# Arduino Project
## This code plays the animation .h file generated by python code.
### Tested on ESP32 and 2.8" SPI TFT display
### Instructions:
1. Save your .h file generated by python script inside the Arduino project directory
2. Include your .h file name inside the main.ino ( #include "your_anim_file_name.h" )

The code uses [TFT_eSPI](https://github.com/Bodmer/TFT_eSPI) by Bodmer library to create sprite and effectively display on the TFT.
Go through the TFT_eSPI's README for setup.
